category_sources: source_facts.description says database search and replace script in PHP; official product page https://interconnectit.com/products/search-and-replace-for-wordpress-databases and official repo README describe a database search/replace tool for PHP/MySQL website migration.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/interconnectit/Search-Replace-DB README uses Search Replace DB; source_facts.homepage is the official interconnectit product page.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary usage documentation; official interconnectit product page is the homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/interconnectit/Search-Replace-DB, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README/product page describe a PHP/MySQL database search and replace tool, commonly for WordPress database migrations.
